inputs.label: Mass of Solute
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the solute substance in milligrams, used for mass/volume calculations.

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the liquid solution in liters.

inputs.label: Solution Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the solution; default is 1 kg/L for water.

inputs.label: Gas Solute Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the solute gas in milliliters, for gas-phase ppb calculations.

inputs.label: Total Gas Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the gas mixture in liters.

formulas.compute: function(inputs) { const ppm_mass = inputs.solute_mass_mg && inputs.solution_volume_L ? (inputs.solute_mass_mg / (inputs.solution_volume_L * inputs.solution_density_kg_per_L)) : 0; const ppb_mass = ppm_mass * 1000; const mg_per_L = inputs.solution_volume_L ? inputs.solute_mass_mg / inputs.solution_volume_L : 0; const ppm_mass_exact = inputs.solution_density_kg_per_L ? mg_per_L / inputs.solution_density_kg_per_L : 0; const ppb_gas = inputs.gas_solute_volume_mL && inputs.total_gas_volume_L ? (inputs.gas_solute_volume_mL / (inputs.total_gas_volume_L * 1000)) * 1e9 : 0; const ppb = (inputs.solute_mass_mg || inputs.gas_solute_volume_mL) ? (ppb_mass || ppb_gas) : 0; return { ppb: ppb, mass_based_ppb: ppb_mass, gas_based_ppb: ppb_gas, concentration_mg_per_L: mg_per_L, concentration_ppm: ppm_mass_exact }; }
